effects.name: SPINAX
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Spinax. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Thorned Fortress
effects.effect: If this Vivosaur takes damage: you can apply HARDEN to this Vivosaur and make a Vivosaur your Opponent controls lose 80LP.

effects.name: Spinax Mega
effects.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your Opponent's Deck.

effects.name: Spinax Terra
effects.effect: Apply HARDEN to all Vivosaurs you control, then all Vivosaurs your Opponent controls lose 40 LP.
